blockingIssues.description: CLI status output omits required fields (uptime, active integrations count, connected agents count), so contract assertion A-CLI-02 is not satisfied.
MCP initialize request without explicit Accept header returns Not Acceptable, conflicting with documented verification flow and expected behavior.
No runtime path registers downstream MCP connections from daemon/CLI surfaces, leaving A-MCP-03/A-MCP-04 unverifiable end-to-end.
Webhook ingestion route bypasses IntegrationAdapter/registry and writes directly to store/event bus, violating adapter-based integration path.
IntegrationRegistry persists status as active before connect completes; failed connect can leave incorrect active state in DB.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission feature metadata with available skills by ensuring a resolvable worker skill exists (or update features to use only available skill names).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both review reports flagged missing/unaligned worker skill usage and deviations from expected procedure due unavailable skill instructions.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update .factory/services.yaml mcp-hub health check probe semantics.

notes: Re-run executed after prior fail synthesis. No completed m1 fix feature was available to review yet (f-fix-m1-scrutiny remains pending), so prior blocking issues remain open.
